# Affordable Treefellers LLC

## Company
- Name: Affordable Treefellers LLC
- Owner: Eric Frauenknecht
- Location: Shawnee, KS
- Phone: (816) 509-3232
- Email: bigvermont@hotmail.com
- Website: https://affordabletreefellers.com
- Hours: Mon-Fri 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM | Closed Saturday & Sunday | Emergency services 24/7
- USDOT: 3421117
- Licensed and insured
- Established: 2013

## Service Area
30-40 mile radius from Shawnee, KS — Kansas side only
Johnson County, Wyandotte County, Leavenworth County, parts of Douglas County

## Services
- Tree Removal: /services/tree-removal
- Tree Trimming & Pruning: /services/tree-trimming-pruning
- Stump Grinding & Removal: /services/stump-grinding
- Storm Damage Cleanup & Emergency Services: /services/storm-damage-cleanup
- Commercial & Residential Tree Care: /services/commercial-residential-tree-care
- Lot & Land Clearing: /services/lot-land-clearing
